data.name: Rebellion: Rise of the Damned
data.detailed_description:
Buy Rebellion: The Beginning


關於此遊戲

This is the continuation of the story set in ‘Rebellion: The Beginning’. Your lovely wife is pressuring you into going back to the past, the past of Rome, in Ancient Rome. Through trial and error, you manage to go there. You are scared at first, but you’ve been through this before. You regain your confidence, your inner strength is shouting. Spartacus is waiting, the rebellion has already begun, so what are you waiting for?

Rebellion: Rise Of The Damned is a story-based Visual Novel in which the player returns to Ancient Rome, he is friends with all the big names of the rebellion: Spartacus, Crixus, etc. He is not alone this time though, he has his wife with him. Nobody knows how this will affect his decisions and actions.

Don’t miss out on such an adventure, we are pleased to offer this game for you guys. Returning cast of characters, stunning women, lots of gore and violence. Watch the Rebellion unfold, save the slaves of the Ancient Roman Empire and kill their leaders.

data.short_description: Rebellion: Rise Of The Damned is an erotic Visual Novel made for ADULTS ONLY. You’ll following the Rebellion and be a key member in destroying the Roman Empire. Huge character cast, beautiful women, lots of nudity. We still have it all.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
